_publications._publicationTitle: A transcriptomic, proteomic, and functional genetic atlas dissects neurofibromin function in the peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: Pan-KRAS inhibition (BI-2865) demonstrated robust biochemical suppression of pERK in NF1 mutant NF9511b pNF cells at 30 min, with an effect on pAKT observed only at higher doses
details: Pan-KRAS inhibition (BI-2865) demonstrated robust biochemical suppression of pERK in NF1 mutant NF9511b pNF cells at 30 min, with an effect on pAKT observed only at higher doses
